name: Chicken thighs (bone-in, skin-on)
description: Bone-in skin-on thighs, skin-down for crispy skin. Grill→Bake. STOP at pull target.
protein: bone-in skin-on chicken thighs, ~6-8 oz each
target_doneness: juicy dark meat with crispy skin

phases.name: Sear skin (Grill 400°F — bottom-element bias crisps skin from below)
Even finish (Bake 375°F — medium fan, dark meat is forgiving)
